meta.source: Freshdesk ticket export Jan 2023 – Jun 2026 (37,225 resolved tickets), curated to 150

serviceCases.title: Arranged a private helicopter from Prayagraj to the Sangam at peak Maha Kumbh for 6 guests
serviceCases.summary: Secured helicopter transfers into the Sangam during the 2025 Maha Kumbh — the most congested pilgrimage window on earth — for a party of six, across two separate dates in February. Routing, permissions and ground coordination were handled end to end.
serviceCases.outcome_note: Both dates flew as planned despite crowd-control restrictions across the city.

serviceCases.title: Planned a luxury air-cruise expedition to Antarctica, including the South America legs
serviceCases.summary: Built a complete Antarctica expedition plan for the Nov–Mar polar season, combining a luxury air-cruise with the South America approach and an 8–10 day itinerary. Cabin categories, charter connections and weather buffers were all mapped before the client committed.

serviceCases.title: Chartered a same-day private yacht in Bali
serviceCases.summary: The client asked for a yacht in Bali for that same day. A vessel with crew was sourced, vetted and confirmed within hours, with pickup logistics arranged from the villa.

serviceCases.title: Lined up private yacht charters in Saint-Tropez with full crew and provisioning options
serviceCases.summary: Produced a vetted shortlist of crewed yachts available out of Saint-Tropez in peak Riviera season, with pricing, capacity and provisioning detail for each. The client picked from real availability, not brochures.

serviceCases.title: Booked a 3-hour sundowner yacht in Maui for a family of eight
serviceCases.summary: Arranged a private sunset sail off Maui for four adults and four kids, matched to a family-safe vessel and crew. Confirmed across time zones for a fixed date in June.

serviceCases.title: Arranged a Dubai sunset yacht day with sandbank stop and water sports
serviceCases.summary: Put together a full-day private yacht experience in Dubai — sunset cruising, a sandbank anchorage and on-board water sports — for a December date in peak season.

serviceCases.title: Chartered a private yacht in Goa for 20 guests, 5–8 pm slot confirmed
serviceCases.summary: Secured a 20-pax private yacht in Goa for a fixed three-hour evening window in October. Vessel capacity, crew and boarding point were locked despite the short notice.

serviceCases.title: Arranged a private jet from Barcelona to Ibiza in peak summer
serviceCases.summary: Booked a private jet for the Barcelona–Ibiza hop on a fixed late-July date — the busiest week of the Balearic season, when empty legs vanish within hours.

serviceCases.title: Sourced private charter options Chandigarh to Dubai
serviceCases.summary: Scoped and priced private charter aircraft for a direct Chandigarh–Dubai sector — a route with no scheduled premium service — including aircraft category and permit timelines.

serviceCases.title: Activated Pranaam meet-and-greet at Bengaluru T2 within the hour for 3 passengers
serviceCases.summary: The client called for airport assistance at Bengaluru Terminal 2 with less than an hour before landing. Pranaam porter and escort service was confirmed for all three passengers before the aircraft touched down.

serviceCases.title: Secured an urgent room at The Oberoi Amarvilas, Agra
serviceCases.summary: Got a confirmed room at the Oberoi Amarvilas — the Taj-view property that runs full months out — on urgent notice for the client's dates.

serviceCases.title: Booked Hôtel de Paris, Monte-Carlo, on the client's exact dates
serviceCases.summary: Confirmed a stay at Hôtel de Paris in Monaco — one of Europe's most demanded addresses — handling category selection and the booking conditions in full.

serviceCases.title: Reserved the Dior Suite penthouse in Paris for a couple
serviceCases.summary: Booked La Suite Dior — the couture penthouse — for a one-couple stay on a fixed August date, coordinating directly for one of the hardest single rooms to confirm in Paris.

serviceCases.title: Scoped a ~35-room Maldives resort block for a single group in peak January
serviceCases.summary: Researched and shortlisted Maldives resorts able to hold roughly 35 rooms for one group in the last week of January — effectively a partial buyout in the islands' tightest week — with experiences mapped per property.

serviceCases.title: Booked seaplane transfers in the Maldives
serviceCases.summary: Arranged seaplane legs for a Maldives stay, syncing the transfer slots with international arrival times so the client never waited at the dock.

serviceCases.title: Reserved the Anantara Jungle Bubble Lodge in Chiang Rai
serviceCases.summary: Confirmed the transparent jungle-bubble suite at Anantara Golden Triangle in Chiang Rai — a two-unit experience that books out months ahead — including the elephant-camp programme.

serviceCases.title: Planned a week in Courchevel with skiing, horse riding and 5-star availability checks
serviceCases.summary: Built a week-long Courchevel programme combining ski arrangements, horse riding and verified five-star availability for the client's dates, with restaurant pairings per evening.

serviceCases.title: Curated an Amalfi Coast and Positano itinerary day by day
serviceCases.summary: Designed a May itinerary across Amalfi, Positano and Sorrento — boats, tables and drives sequenced so the client never doubled back on the coast road.

serviceCases.title: Curated a 25th-anniversary itinerary across New Zealand
serviceCases.summary: Built a full New Zealand anniversary itinerary from scratch — lodges, scenic flights and pacing matched to the couple rather than a template.

serviceCases.title: Built the Everest breakfast experience itinerary
serviceCases.summary: Planned the helicopter-to-Everest breakfast experience — flight windows, acclimatisation stops and weather contingency — as part of a larger Nepal routing.

serviceCases.title: Found an urgent stay in Nice, France, for fixed September dates
serviceCases.summary: Ran an urgent accommodation search in Nice for an 18–22 September window when the city was effectively full, and produced bookable options the same day.

serviceCases.title: Arranged a helicopter from Bengaluru to Mahabalipuram
serviceCases.summary: Organised a private helicopter transfer from Bengaluru to Mahabalipuram for a Friday departure — permits, helipad clearances and ground cars at both ends.

serviceCases.title: Produced an urgent luxury SUV with chauffeur, Jaipur to Delhi, for 3 passengers
serviceCases.summary: Sourced a luxury SUV with driver for an immediate Jaipur–Delhi run for three passengers, confirmed within hours of the ask.

serviceCases.title: Handled the St. Moritz stay end to end — transfers, tables and the Zurich airport run
serviceCases.summary: Managed a St. Moritz trip in full: Kempinski-to-Zurich-airport transfer, plus a curated list of the bars and restaurants actually worth the client's evenings.

serviceCases.title: Planned a Mykonos holiday for 10 — restaurants, yacht and beach clubs
serviceCases.summary: Built a five-day Mykonos programme for a group of ten: dinner tables, a private yacht day and beach-club placements across the peak late-July window.

serviceCases.title: Worked a table at Noma, Copenhagen — the hardest reservation in the world
serviceCases.summary: Pursued and secured dining at Noma in Copenhagen across the client's flexible late-October and early-November windows. Noma's seatings release and vanish in minutes; flexibility plus persistence got it done.

serviceCases.title: Repeatedly secured tables at Gaggan, Bangkok — for parties of 2 to 4, on short notice
serviceCases.summary: Confirmed multiple reservations at Gaggan in Bangkok across different months and group sizes, including short-notice asks. Gaggan releases very few covers and is among Asia's most chased tables.
serviceCases.outcome_note: Clients keep coming back to us specifically for Bangkok dining.

serviceCases.title: Booked CORE by Clare Smyth — 3 Michelin stars — for 6 adults and 4 kids
serviceCases.summary: Secured a ten-cover family booking at CORE by Clare Smyth in London, a three-star room that rarely takes large parties with children, and aligned the menu for the group.

serviceCases.title: Chased a counter seat at Sushi Sugita, Tokyo
serviceCases.summary: Worked Tokyo's most closed sushi counter — Sushi Sugita — across a four-day flexible window for the client. Sugita does not take direct foreign bookings; access runs entirely on relationships.

serviceCases.title: Same-day lunch table at Sushisamba Dubai, confirmed within the hour
serviceCases.summary: The client wanted Sushisamba Dubai at 1:30 pm that same day, party of four. Confirmed within the hour — and we've since repeated Sushisamba Dubai bookings for groups of 2 to 6, including one with a surprise cake staged at the table.

serviceCases.title: Dinner at Sushi Samba, Heron Tower, London
serviceCases.summary: Locked a prime-time dinner at Sushi Samba in London's Heron Tower — one of the city's most over-subscribed view tables.

serviceCases.title: Standing access to Trishna, Mumbai — tables for 2 to 6, again and again
serviceCases.summary: Confirmed repeated bookings at Trishna in Mumbai across party sizes and dates, including weekday prime slots and a Saturday lunch for four — a room that turns away walk-ins nightly.

serviceCases.title: Urgent dinner at Masque, Mumbai — with a backup locked in parallel
serviceCases.summary: Secured an urgent reservation at Masque, Mumbai's tasting-menu flagship, while holding The Bombay Canteen as a confirmed fallback so the evening could not fail either way.

serviceCases.title: Urgent table at Ministry of Crab, Colombo
serviceCases.summary: Got the client into Ministry of Crab in Sri Lanka on urgent notice — the room books out weeks ahead and holds almost nothing back for late requests.

serviceCases.title: Table for 12 at Bagatelle, Courchevel, in peak ski season
serviceCases.summary: Reserved a 12-cover table at Bagatelle Courchevel across two candidate March dates at the height of the season, when the room is effectively closed to new names.

serviceCases.title: Dior Café, Paris — table for 6
serviceCases.summary: Booked the Dior Café in Paris for six guests, a couture-house café that declines most direct requests, and have since repeated 2–3 pax bookings on other dates.

serviceCases.title: Private dinner at Le Restaurant Monsieur Dior with a customised menu
serviceCases.summary: Arranged a private dinner at Le Restaurant Monsieur Dior in Paris with the menu adapted to the client's preferences, paired with a dessert visit to La Pâtisserie Dior the same day.

serviceCases.title: Mapped vegetarian fine dining at Michelin level — Barcelona and London
serviceCases.summary: Curated genuinely vegetarian Michelin-star options in Barcelona and London for clients who don't compromise on either count, then converted the picks into confirmed tables.

serviceCases.title: Back-to-back Michelin solo dinners in Hong Kong — Chaat and New Punjab Club
serviceCases.summary: Booked consecutive solo dinners at Chaat and New Punjab Club — both Michelin-starred — on back-to-back April nights in Hong Kong for a travelling client.

serviceCases.title: Built a Michelin dining circuit for Kyoto, then booked it
serviceCases.summary: Curated the Kyoto leg of a Japan trip around 1–3 star rooms with a vegetarian-friendly mix, sequenced bookings across the stay, and handled the no-foreign-booking houses through partners.

serviceCases.title: Counter seats at Wasabi by Morimoto at 9:45 pm for 3
serviceCases.summary: Confirmed late-evening sushi-counter seats at Wasabi by Morimoto at the Taj — the counter itself, not the room — for a party of three.

serviceCases.title: Le Petit Chef, Goa — the projection-mapped dinner, table for 2
serviceCases.summary: Reserved Le Petit Chef in Goa — the 3D projection-mapped dining experience with a handful of seatings a night — for a December date in peak Goa season.

serviceCases.title: Zuma Dubai for lunch — on New Year's Day, booked the same morning
serviceCases.summary: The ask came in at 1 pm on January 1st: Zuma Dubai, lunch, now. Confirmed the same day, in the single most oversubscribed dining week of the Dubai calendar.

serviceCases.title: Table for 15 in Goa at 1 pm on January 1st
serviceCases.summary: Found and confirmed a 15-pax New Year's Day lunch in Goa — second-house party crowd, every venue full — with hours of notice.

serviceCases.title: Urgent table at One8, Delhi — outside seating or first-floor balcony, as specified
serviceCases.summary: Secured an urgent table for two at One8 in Delhi, holding out for the client's exact seating preference rather than taking the first availability.

serviceCases.title: Valentine's window table at Willow, Singapore — Michelin-starred
serviceCases.summary: Booked Michelin-starred Willow in Singapore for the 14th–15th February window — the two hardest dining dates of the year anywhere.

serviceCases.title: Post-concert dinner for 10 at 8 pm, walking distance from the venue, Dubai
serviceCases.summary: Confirmed a 10-cover 8 pm dinner near a sold-out Dubai concert so the client's group walked from the show straight to the table.

serviceCases.title: Urgent same-day table at Four Seasons, Mumbai, for 4
serviceCases.summary: Turned around an urgent same-day reservation at the Four Seasons Mumbai for four guests within the hour of the ask.

serviceCases.title: Prime 9:15 pm table for 8 at Carine, Emirates Golf Club, Dubai
serviceCases.summary: Reserved Carine at Emirates Golf Club for eight guests at peak Friday timing — a club room with heavy member priority.

serviceCases.title: Curated Michelin dining across Lucerne, Interlaken and Montreux for a Swiss roadtrip
serviceCases.summary: Mapped Michelin-starred rooms along the client's Switzerland route — Lucerne, Interlaken, Montreux — and booked the stops so the drive ate well every single day.

serviceCases.title: Flew a crate of Alphonso mangoes from India to a recipient in the UK
serviceCases.summary: A client wanted to send peak-season Alphonso mangoes to someone important to him in the UK. We handled sourcing from the right orchard, export-grade packing, phytosanitary paperwork and door delivery in Britain.

serviceCases.title: Ran a weekly gift programme counting down to a client's wedding
serviceCases.summary: Designed and executed a multi-week gifting countdown to a wedding — a different curated gift delivered every week, each themed to the couple, with the full calendar managed so the client never had to think about it once.
serviceCases.outcome_note: The programme ran to the wedding date without a single missed week.

serviceCases.title: Sourced a Glenlivet 25-year-old for a birthday delivery in Jaipur
serviceCases.summary: Located a Glenlivet 25 Year Old — limited allocation in India — and delivered it as a birthday gift in Jaipur alongside a curated bouquet, on the date.

serviceCases.title: Sourced La Maison du Chocolat in Bengaluru
serviceCases.summary: Procured La Maison du Chocolat — the Parisian chocolatier with no India retail presence — for a Bengaluru delivery, handling import and cold-chain so the box arrived as it left Paris.

serviceCases.title: Curated and delivered a corporate Diwali programme — 45 bespoke gift boxes
serviceCases.summary: Designed 45 curated Diwali gift boxes for a client's corporate list, presented tiered options at multiple price points, and ran the full Delhi-NCR delivery schedule to land before the festival.

serviceCases.title: Delivered Diwali hampers in Dubai and Abu Dhabi for an India-based client
serviceCases.summary: Arranged festival hampers delivered across Dubai and Abu Dhabi on a Monday deadline for a client sitting in India — sourcing, customisation and last-mile handled locally in the UAE.

serviceCases.title: Cake and bouquet delivered to a hotel in Banff, Canada
serviceCases.summary: Coordinated a fresh cake and bouquet to a client's family at a hotel in Banff — small-town Canada, no premium delivery network — timed to the morning of the occasion.

serviceCases.title: Rakhi and gift hamper delivered in Singapore
serviceCases.summary: Sourced a Rakhi with an accompanying hamper and delivered it to the client's brother in Singapore in time for Raksha Bandhan.

serviceCases.title: Chinese New Year gifts delivered inside China to a fixed date
serviceCases.summary: Arranged gift and cake deliveries inside mainland China for Chinese New Year — a market where foreign gifting logistics routinely fail — landing on the 5th of February as specified.

serviceCases.title: Valentine's morning in Kolkata: strawberries, flowers and a luxury fragrance
serviceCases.summary: Composed and delivered a Valentine's gift in Kolkata — fresh strawberries, an arrangement and a luxury fragrance — landing on the morning of the 14th.

serviceCases.title: Newborn hamper delivered to The Leela Palace, Bengaluru
serviceCases.summary: Curated a newborn gift hamper and had it waiting at The Leela Palace Bengaluru for the family's arrival.

serviceCases.title: Tracked down Cherrapunji gin in Delhi as a Rakhi gift
serviceCases.summary: Sourced a bottle of Cherrapunji gin — patchy distribution even in metros — in Delhi and delivered it as a Rakhi gift on schedule.

serviceCases.title: Bouquet delivered to Dharamshala
serviceCases.summary: Delivered a fresh premium bouquet in Dharamshala — a hill town with no florist network worth the name — on the client's date.

serviceCases.title: Next-morning flowers in Mumbai, handed directly to the client's driver
serviceCases.summary: Client messaged at night: flowers in Bombay tomorrow morning, handed to my driver. Done exactly as asked — right arrangement, right handover, right time.

serviceCases.title: Custom-embroidered matching polos for a couple's anniversary
serviceCases.summary: Produced customised matching polo shirts for a couple's anniversary — design, embroidery and delivery handled to the date.

serviceCases.title: Father's Day flowers in two cities at once — Hyderabad and Bhilai
serviceCases.summary: Delivered Father's Day arrangements simultaneously to the client's father in Hyderabad and father-in-law in Bhilai — one of them a city with essentially no premium florists — both on the morning itself.

serviceCases.title: Curated a one-of-a-kind gift for an 81st birthday
serviceCases.summary: Built a shortlist of genuinely unusual gifts for a mother's 81st birthday — pieces with meaning rather than price tags — and delivered the chosen one with flowers on the 23rd.

serviceCases.title: Champagne, bouquet and a spa session gifted in Singapore on 2 days' notice
serviceCases.summary: Packaged a champagne-flowers-spa gift experience in Singapore for a Thursday deadline, booked and delivered from India with no local presence required of the client.

serviceCases.title: Two-tier eggless cake delivered in Delhi to an exact date
serviceCases.summary: Commissioned a two-tier eggless celebration cake from the right baker in Delhi and delivered it on the 7th as specified — dietary constraint and design both honoured.

serviceCases.title: Flowers and cake delivered in Solapur
serviceCases.summary: Executed a flowers-and-cake delivery in Solapur — tier-3 city, zero premium vendors — by building the supply on the ground for that one delivery.

serviceCases.title: Flowers, chocolate cake and a Saregama Carvaan delivered to a doctor in Hyderabad
serviceCases.summary: Composed a thank-you gift for the client's doctor — arrangement, chocolate cake and a Saregama Carvaan music player — delivered in Hyderabad with a personal note transcribed exactly.

serviceCases.title: Four packets of dates delivered to Dublin
serviceCases.summary: Sourced and shipped specific dates to a recipient in Dublin — a tiny ask executed with the same precision as a big one.

serviceCases.title: Curated tiered hamper menus for UHNI corporate gifting
serviceCases.summary: Produced curated hampers at multiple price points for a client's ultra-high-net-worth contact list, presented as a menu so they could match hamper to relationship in one sitting.

serviceCases.title: Gift options in London under a fixed budget, delivered by Sunday
serviceCases.summary: Curated and executed a London gift purchase under a hard ₹50k ceiling against a Sunday deadline — sourced, wrapped and delivered locally.

serviceCases.title: Spa gift vouchers at the Grand Hyatt, Delhi
serviceCases.summary: Arranged full-body and back-treatment spa vouchers at the Hyatt in Delhi as a giftable package, with the booking flexibility handled in advance.

serviceCases.title: 10 lounge tickets for Coldplay Mumbai — after the public sale crashed and sold out
serviceCases.summary: When Coldplay's January 2025 Mumbai shows sold out within minutes and the resale market went vertical, we delivered 10 lounge tickets for one client — and fulfilled multiple parallel requests for 4–12 seats including standing and lounge categories.
serviceCases.outcome_note: Repeated the delivery across several client groups for the same tour.

serviceCases.title: Wimbledon tickets — including requests landed days before play
serviceCases.summary: Sourced Wimbledon tickets across multiple years and rounds, including men's draw seats and late asks placed after the tournament had begun. Wimbledon has no meaningful public inventory; this is pure access.

serviceCases.title: 10 gold passes for Diljit Dosanjh's Dil-Luminati show in Delhi
serviceCases.summary: Delivered 10 gold-category passes for the Delhi leg of the Dil-Luminati tour — the most demanded Indian tour of the year — and serviced parallel requests for lounge, VIP and fan-pit across the same city.

serviceCases.title: 16 tickets for Diljit Dosanjh in Bengaluru — one group, one block
serviceCases.summary: Secured 16 seats together for the Bengaluru Dil-Luminati show — keeping a group that size in one block for a sold-out arena date is the hard part, not the tickets.

serviceCases.title: Lounge for 10 at Diljit Dosanjh, Jaipur
serviceCases.summary: Confirmed 10 lounge tickets for the Jaipur stop of the Dil-Luminati tour on the 3rd of November.

serviceCases.title: 4 platinum lounge tickets for Karan Aujla in Delhi
serviceCases.summary: Delivered four platinum-lounge tickets for Karan Aujla's December Delhi show after general categories had gone.

serviceCases.title: IPL final — hospitality box with car passes
serviceCases.summary: Arranged IPL final tickets in air-conditioned hospitality with matching car passes, plus repeated finals fulfilment across seasons for groups of 4 to 16.

serviceCases.title: T20 World Cup final in Barbados — hospitality for 2
serviceCases.summary: Sourced hospitality-category tickets for the T20 World Cup final in Barbados for two guests — international cricket's scarcest seat that year, an ocean away.

serviceCases.title: Paris Olympics tickets — including a group of 8–10 for a single Saturday
serviceCases.summary: Fulfilled Paris 2024 Olympics requests across dates, including a block of 8–10 seats for one Saturday session — Olympic group inventory effectively doesn't exist at retail.

serviceCases.title: Taylor Swift Eras tour — floor and front-standing across Madrid, Vienna and London
serviceCases.summary: Sourced Eras tour tickets across three European legs — front-standing in Vienna, 6 seats in Madrid, floor tickets in London — for different client groups during the most demanded tour in history.

serviceCases.title: 4 passes for F1 at Spa-Francorchamps — race Sunday
serviceCases.summary: Delivered four Sunday passes for the Belgian Grand Prix at Spa, race day, the only day that matters.

serviceCases.title: Singapore Grand Prix access
serviceCases.summary: Arranged Singapore GP tickets — the night race where premium inventory is locked by corporates a year out.

serviceCases.title: Two extra seats *next to* the client's existing ones — sold-out David Gilmour show
serviceCases.summary: The client already had seats to a sold-out David Gilmour concert and wanted two more, adjacent. We found the specific neighbouring seats — not just any two — and secured them.

serviceCases.title: Tomorrowland passes for the 27th
serviceCases.summary: Sourced Tomorrowland entry for a fixed festival date — a festival that sells out globally within minutes of registration.

serviceCases.title: 6 tickets for Arijit Singh in Mumbai, March 23
serviceCases.summary: Confirmed six tickets for Arijit Singh's Mumbai concert on a fixed March date, with the seats delivered to the client's parents' home in another city when asked.

serviceCases.title: Arijit Singh in London — 3 tickets across flexible dates
serviceCases.summary: Secured three tickets to Arijit Singh's London show across the client's August–September flexibility window.

serviceCases.title: Bryan Adams Mumbai — 4 tickets, December 13
serviceCases.summary: Delivered four tickets for Bryan Adams' Mumbai show, one of several parallel requests we filled for that date.

serviceCases.title: Dua Lipa Mumbai tickets — plus the Wembley leg with a hotel walkable to the stadium
serviceCases.summary: Fulfilled Dua Lipa requests on both continents: Mumbai show tickets, and for the Wembley date a hotel booked within walking distance of the stadium for two.

serviceCases.title: AR Rahman in Singapore
serviceCases.summary: Arranged tickets for AR Rahman's Singapore concert for a client travelling in for the show.

serviceCases.title: Access to Lakmé Fashion Week 2025
serviceCases.summary: Secured attendance at Lakmé Fashion Week — an invite-led event with no public ticketing path at all.

serviceCases.title: 6 tickets for the Jaipur IPL match on April 22
serviceCases.summary: Confirmed six tickets for the Jaipur IPL fixture — stadium inventory in Jaipur is thin and goes to local networks first.

serviceCases.title: Symphony of Stars, Abu Dhabi — 2 tickets, June 1
serviceCases.summary: Booked a pair of tickets for the Symphony of Stars concert in Abu Dhabi on the client's exact date.

serviceCases.title: Diljit Dosanjh in Abu Dhabi — party of 4
serviceCases.summary: Secured four tickets for Diljit Dosanjh's Abu Dhabi show for a client flying in from India.

serviceCases.title: Lollapalooza India passes
serviceCases.summary: Arranged Lollapalooza India access alongside a parallel Diljit ask — one client, one weekend, both delivered.

serviceCases.title: Adele in Europe — 3 seated tickets
serviceCases.summary: Sourced three seated tickets for Adele's European shows — a residency-scale event with virtually no seated resale supply.

serviceCases.title: Sourced a Rolex Cosmograph Daytona — no dealer waitlist, no years of waiting
serviceCases.summary: Procured a Rolex Daytona for a client outside the authorised-dealer queue, where the official waitlist runs years. Daytona, GMT-Master II and Submariner requests are a steady drumbeat for us — sourced, verified and delivered.

serviceCases.title: Sourced Hermès Birkin and Kelly bags — exact spec: size, leather, hardware, colour
serviceCases.summary: Delivered Hermès quota bags to specification — Birkin 25 and 30 in Togo with gold hardware, Kelly 25 Sellier in Epsom, Mini Kellys in requested colours — pieces Hermès itself will not sell without years of purchase history.
serviceCases.outcome_note: Repeat Hermès briefs from the same clients, increasingly specific each time.

serviceCases.title: Hunted a Kelly 15/20 in emerald green
serviceCases.summary: Ran a global search for a Mini Kelly in a specific emerald green — one of the rarest colour-size combinations Hermès produces — presenting verified options with provenance.

serviceCases.title: Sourced an Hermès Constance 18 — gold hardware, Epsom leather
serviceCases.summary: Located a Constance 18 to the client's exact preference of hardware and leather, with authentication handled before presentation.

serviceCases.title: Goyard pieces on demand — Saigon Structure Nano, totes, trolleys
serviceCases.summary: Sourced Goyard across briefs — the Saigon Structure Nano, white totes, trolley bags — for a house that has no e-commerce and famously restricts purchases, and arranged boutique appointments where the client preferred to buy in person.

serviceCases.title: Sourced a Patek Philippe Nautilus 5712R-001
serviceCases.summary: Procured the rose-gold Nautilus 5712R — a discontinued-tier reference trading far above retail with multi-year authorised waitlists — verified and delivered.

serviceCases.title: Located a Patek Nautilus 5980 flyback chronograph with denim-effect calf strap
serviceCases.summary: Tracked the exact 5980 flyback configuration the client specified, down to the denim-effect strap — a one-spec search executed across international dealers.

serviceCases.title: Sourced a Patek Philippe Gondolo Small Seconds
serviceCases.summary: Ran sourcing for a Patek Gondolo Small Seconds — a quiet, low-production reference most dealers never see — and presented verified availability with pricing.

serviceCases.title: A Rolex Datejust in hand in Mumbai — by tomorrow, as a gift
serviceCases.summary: The client needed any available Rolex Datejust in Mumbai for gifting the next day. Located, verified and arranged within the deadline.

serviceCases.title: Built a same-week shortlist across the grails: Nautilus, Aquanaut, Daytona Oysterflex, Royal Oak
serviceCases.summary: For a client deciding between the four hardest sports watches in the world, we produced a live, purchasable shortlist across Patek, Rolex and Audemars Piguet in days — not a catalogue, actual pieces.

serviceCases.title: Van Cleef & Arpels Alhambra bracelets — malachite and mother-of-pearl
serviceCases.summary: Sourced Alhambra bracelets in both malachite and mother-of-pearl for separate briefs, including verifying India delivery for a maison that tightly controls cross-border sales.

serviceCases.title: Cartier Juste un Clou, small model, size 17 — exact size secured
serviceCases.summary: Procured the Juste un Clou bracelet in the precise small-model size 17 — boutiques routinely run out of mid-range sizes for months.

serviceCases.title: Sourced a vintage women's Rolex / Cartier
serviceCases.summary: Ran a vintage hunt for a women's Rolex or Cartier — verified provenance, serviced movement, honest dial — rather than the polished-over pieces flooding the vintage market.

serviceCases.title: Apple Vision Pro in India before India launch
serviceCases.summary: Sourced the Apple Vision Pro for an Indian client while the device was US-only — procurement, import and delivery handled before official availability existed.

serviceCases.title: Dior advent calendar in December — after global sellout
serviceCases.summary: Secured the Dior beauty advent calendar in December, weeks after worldwide sellout, including the billing trail the client wanted.

serviceCases.title: Hermès Chypre sandals in two sizes — handled in complete discretion
serviceCases.summary: Sourced Hermès Chypre sandals in UK 9 and 11 — perpetually out of stock in popular sizes — for a brief that required total discretion from start to finish.

serviceCases.title: Olympia Le-Tan custom clutch — commissioned, paid, imported
serviceCases.summary: Managed a custom Olympia Le-Tan clutch commission end to end: the bespoke work with the Paris atelier, payment and customs into India.

serviceCases.title: Ayrton Senna signed McLaren memorabilia — 100th-win print and Donington 1993
serviceCases.summary: Sourced authenticated Ayrton Senna memorabilia — the McLaren 100th-win signed print and a Donington 1993 Craner Curves signed piece — from the collector market.

serviceCases.title: Sourced an Azul Popeye sculpture
serviceCases.summary: Located and procured a collectible Azul Popeye sculpture for a client's home — art-market sourcing with authentication and shipping handled.

serviceCases.title: Indian contemporary art sourcing — Ganesh pop art and listed-artist paintings
serviceCases.summary: Sourced Indian contemporary works — including a named listed artist's painting and Ganesh-themed pop art — with gallery verification and pricing negotiation.

serviceCases.title: Found a vintage record player from a single reference photo
serviceCases.summary: The client sent one photo. We identified the model, found a working vintage unit, and delivered it restored.

serviceCases.title: Hermès Picotin 18 with gold hardware in pastel
serviceCases.summary: Sourced a Picotin 18 in a pastel colourway with gold hardware — a configuration boutiques rarely receive — verified and delivered.

serviceCases.title: Official Chelsea black kit jersey
serviceCases.summary: Procured the Chelsea black jersey in the client's size from official stock when domestic channels showed nothing.

serviceCases.title: Immediate purchase of a Tata Safari — car procured and delivered
serviceCases.summary: Handled an immediate-buy brief for a Tata Safari: dealer allocation, variant, paperwork and delivery compressed into days against months-long waiting periods.

serviceCases.title: Hermès belts and small leather goods on recurring briefs
serviceCases.summary: Fulfilled repeat Hermès briefs beyond bags — belts, buckles, Jige Élan clutches, wallets — sourced to spec and delivered, often as gifts on deadlines.

serviceCases.title: Relocated a client's dogs from Mumbai to Dubai
serviceCases.summary: Managed the full international relocation of the client's dogs from Mumbai to Dubai — vet certifications, import permits, crate logistics and a pet-cleared flight plan. We also priced a private jet option for the family to fly with the dogs.

serviceCases.title: The Hermès appointment machine — leather appointments across Paris, Milan, Geneva, Lisbon and Rome
serviceCases.summary: Secured Hermès leather-goods appointments — the gateway to quota bags — across five European cities for travelling clients, often aligned to their exact itinerary dates. These appointments are not bookable; they are granted.
serviceCases.outcome_note: Several appointments converted into quota-bag purchases on the spot.

serviceCases.title: Placed a nanny in Srinagar for a 3-month summer engagement
serviceCases.summary: Sourced, vetted and placed a nanny in Srinagar for a three-month stay starting end of May — a placement market that effectively doesn't exist in Kashmir.

serviceCases.title: Found an educated, passport-holding nanny for a 4-year-old — travel-ready
serviceCases.summary: Recruited a nanny meeting an unusual spec: educated, holding a valid passport, ready to travel internationally with the family at short notice.

serviceCases.title: Beach villa in Dubai with a Gujarati chef installed
serviceCases.summary: Arranged a Dubai beach villa with a Gujarati home chef hired and installed for the stay — the family ate exactly as they do at home, on a beach in the Gulf.

serviceCases.title: Hired one continental and one Gujarati/Marwadi chef for a single household
serviceCases.summary: Recruited two private chefs for one home — continental and Gujarati/Marwadi cuisine — running parallel vetting tracks and trials.

serviceCases.title: Private chef for a special occasion in Bengaluru
serviceCases.summary: Placed a private chef for a one-night special occasion in Bengaluru — menu designed with the client, trial-tested before the evening.

serviceCases.title: Full-trip personal security for a travelling companion
serviceCases.summary: Arranged a vetted bodyguard to cover a client's travelling companion for the entire duration of an international stay — briefed, licensed and discreet. We've since built security into multi-day itineraries that included dinners and parties.

serviceCases.title: A butler for the entire Dubai trip
serviceCases.summary: Placed a trained butler with the client's party for the full length of a Dubai stay — luggage, scheduling, errands — invisible until needed.

serviceCases.title: Urgent medicines delivered in New Delhi
serviceCases.summary: Sourced and delivered specific prescription medicines in New Delhi on urgent timelines — including a four-strip ask where local pharmacies showed no stock.

serviceCases.title: Located a yellow-fever vaccination slot in Juhu
serviceCases.summary: Found a same-area yellow-fever vaccination option in Juhu, Mumbai — a vaccine administered only at designated centres with chronic slot scarcity — ahead of the client's travel.

serviceCases.title: Passport for a 6-month-old, plus renewals and visa guidance for the family
serviceCases.summary: Navigated a passport application for a six-month-old alongside the parents' renewal and London visa requirements — the entire family's documents handled as one project.

serviceCases.title: Schengen visa pathway for an Indian citizen on UAE residence
serviceCases.summary: Untangled the Schengen application route for an Indian passport holder resident in the UAE — jurisdiction, documentation and appointment strategy mapped end to end.

serviceCases.title: US visa interview slot in Kolkata inside a 2-week window
serviceCases.summary: Secured a US visa interview appointment in Kolkata within the client's hard 15–31 October window, against backlogs running months.

serviceCases.title: A jaapa (postnatal) maid with a UK visa
serviceCases.summary: Sourced a traditional jaapa maid who already held a valid UK visa — so she could fly to London for the family's newborn. A search most agencies refuse outright.

serviceCases.title: Wheelchair-accessible caravan in Ahmedabad
serviceCases.summary: Sourced a wheelchair-accessible caravan in Ahmedabad — vehicle category that barely exists in India — and separately placed an assistant driver trained in wheelchair support for an elderly parent.

serviceCases.title: Recovered lost baggage from Hayman Island, Australia
serviceCases.summary: Chased and recovered a client's lost baggage from Hayman Island in Australia — coordinating across the resort, the airline and international forwarding until it was back in the client's hands.

serviceCases.title: Polaroid camera produced in Delhi — urgently
serviceCases.summary: Sourced a Polaroid camera in Delhi against a same-day clock — found, bought and delivered.

serviceCases.title: A Diwali-themed puppet show, produced on request
serviceCases.summary: Commissioned and staged a Diwali-themed puppet show for a client's family celebration — performers, script and staging arranged from scratch.

serviceCases.title: Produced a Game of Thrones themed birthday
serviceCases.summary: Designed and executed a full Game of Thrones themed birthday — set, props and programme — on a fixed May date.

serviceCases.title: Midnight beach anniversary setup at the Taj, Goa
serviceCases.summary: Staged a surprise midnight anniversary setup on the beach at a Taj property in Goa — décor, timing and hotel coordination, with the client's spouse none the wiser until the reveal.

serviceCases.title: Proposal engineering in Mumbai — venues, backups and ideas
serviceCases.summary: Built proposal options for Mumbai — primary venue, alternates and creative concepts — so the client chose the moment, not whatever was available.

serviceCases.title: Imported a one-year-old puppy from the US to India
serviceCases.summary: Managed the import of a young puppy from the United States to India — breeder coordination, vaccination schedule, quarantine compliance and flight logistics. We've also run pet transfers from India to Europe.

serviceCases.title: Medical concierge — specialist appointments secured with named doctors
serviceCases.summary: Booked specialist medical appointments on request — including a sought-after ultrasound specialist and a top diabetologist in Bengaluru — cutting waits from weeks to days.

serviceCases.title: Urgent printing and delivery near Trump Tower, Mumbai
serviceCases.summary: Executed an urgent print-and-deliver job to a Mumbai address within hours — the small, unglamorous asks get the same machine as the big ones.

conversationHooks.hook: During the Maha Kumbh, when the roads into Prayagraj were gridlocked for days, we flew a family of six by private helicopter straight to the Sangam — twice.
conversationHooks.context: Use when the lead doubts you can handle India's hardest logistics.

conversationHooks.hook: We've planned everything from a same-day yacht in Bali to a full Antarctica air-cruise expedition. The question is never whether it's possible — it's how you want it done.
conversationHooks.context: Opening line to frame range, from spontaneous to once-in-a-lifetime.

conversationHooks.hook: We don't recommend the Instagram places. We find the hidden ones — matched to your hygiene standard, your adventure level, your past trips.
conversationHooks.context: Use when the lead says they already have a travel agent.

conversationHooks.hook: One client landed at Bengaluru T2 with less than an hour's notice — our airport escort was waiting at the aerobridge before the plane docked.
conversationHooks.context: Use when the lead asks how fast you can move.

conversationHooks.hook: We've booked the Dior penthouse suite in Paris and held 35 rooms in the Maldives for a single family in peak January. Scale or rarity — we've done both.
conversationHooks.context: Use with leads planning big family travel or trophy stays.

conversationHooks.hook: We've put clients into Noma, Gaggan, and a three-Michelin-star room in London with six adults and four kids. The 'impossible table' is our most routine request.
conversationHooks.context: Use when the lead tests you with a famous restaurant name.

conversationHooks.hook: On January 1st a client asked for Zuma Dubai at lunch — that day. He was at the table by afternoon.
conversationHooks.context: Use to prove same-day capability in the worst possible week.

conversationHooks.hook: When we book Masque on an urgent ask, we lock a backup table in parallel. Your evening can't fail — that's the design.
conversationHooks.context: Use when the lead worries about reliability of last-minute plans.

conversationHooks.hook: Tokyo sushi counters that don't take foreign bookings, Michelin circuits across Kyoto — Japan dining runs on relationships, and we have them.
conversationHooks.context: Use with leads planning Japan trips.

conversationHooks.hook: Tell me the city and the occasion. Vegetarian Michelin in Barcelona, a 12-top at Bagatelle Courchevel in peak season — specificity is exactly what we're for.
conversationHooks.context: Use to pull the lead's actual dining brief out of them.

conversationHooks.hook: A client wanted to send Alphonso mangoes to someone in the UK. We sourced from the orchard, handled the export paperwork, and delivered them to the door in Britain.
conversationHooks.context: Use to show gifting has no borders. Memorable, low-flex, human.

conversationHooks.hook: For one client's wedding we ran a gift countdown — a different curated surprise delivered every single week until the wedding day. He never had to think about it once.
conversationHooks.context: Use with leads who have anniversaries, weddings, or courtships in play.

conversationHooks.hook: We've delivered flowers and cake in Solapur and Dharamshala — towns with no premium vendors at all. We built the supply for one delivery. That's the standard everywhere.
conversationHooks.context: Use when the lead's family is in a tier-2/3 city.

conversationHooks.hook: Our gifting team's only job is making you look incredible to the people you care about. You give us the person; we do the thinking.
conversationHooks.context: Use as a positioning line for the gifts category itself.

conversationHooks.hook: Diwali season, one brief: 45 curated boxes for a corporate list, three price tiers, all delivered across Delhi-NCR before the festival. We run gifting like an operation.
conversationHooks.context: Use with business-owner leads — opens the corporate gifting door.

conversationHooks.hook: When Coldplay Mumbai sold out in minutes, our clients still walked into the lounge — we delivered ten tickets for one group alone.
conversationHooks.context: Use the moment a lead mentions concerts. India's most famous sellout.

conversationHooks.hook: Wimbledon, the Paris Olympics, an F1 Sunday at Spa, the T20 World Cup final in Barbados — the seats the public can't buy are exactly the ones we work in.
conversationHooks.context: Use to frame the events category at the top end.

conversationHooks.hook: A client had seats to a sold-out David Gilmour show and wanted two more — next to his. Not two anywhere. Next to his. We found them.
conversationHooks.context: Use to demonstrate precision, not just access.

conversationHooks.hook: Diljit's Dil-Luminati tour — we delivered in Delhi, Bengaluru, Jaipur, Hyderabad, Kolkata, even Abu Dhabi. Whatever city, whatever category: lounge, VIP, fan pit.
conversationHooks.context: Use with leads who follow Indian artists.

conversationHooks.hook: Sixteen tickets, one block, sold-out arena. Keeping a group together is the hard part — that's what you're paying for, not the ticket.
conversationHooks.context: Use when the lead wants to take a large group.

conversationHooks.hook: We sourced a Rolex Daytona without the dealer waitlist — the official queue runs years. We didn't use a dealer.
conversationHooks.context: The single strongest retail proof line. Use early.

conversationHooks.hook: Birkin 25 in Togo with gold hardware, Kelly 25 Sellier in noir, a Mini Kelly in emerald green — we source Hermès to exact spec, not 'whatever's available'.
conversationHooks.context: Use when the lead or their spouse carries Hermès.

conversationHooks.hook: A client needed a Rolex Datejust in Mumbai as a gift — by the next day. It was in his hands on time.
conversationHooks.context: Use to prove speed in retail, not just rarity.

conversationHooks.hook: One client sent us a single photo of a vintage record player. We identified the model, found a working unit, and delivered it restored.
conversationHooks.context: Use to show the sourcing engine works from almost nothing.

conversationHooks.hook: Vision Pro before it launched in India, the Dior advent calendar weeks after global sellout, signed Senna memorabilia — if it exists somewhere, we can reach it.
conversationHooks.context: Use for the 'can you really get anything?' moment.

conversationHooks.hook: A client moved to Dubai — we relocated his dogs from Mumbai: permits, vets, crates, flights. We even priced a private jet so the family could fly with them.
conversationHooks.context: The warmest proof story. Use with family-oriented leads.

conversationHooks.hook: Hermès leather appointments in Paris, Milan, Geneva, Lisbon and Rome — aligned to our clients' travel dates. Those appointments aren't booked. They're granted.
conversationHooks.context: Use with leads who shop the maisons in Europe.

conversationHooks.hook: We found a jaapa maid who already held a UK visa so she could fly to London for a newborn. Most agencies won't even take that brief.
conversationHooks.context: Use to show staffing reach — the requests nobody else attempts.

conversationHooks.hook: Lost baggage on Hayman Island in Australia. We chased it across the resort, the airline and international forwarding until it was back in the client's hands.
conversationHooks.context: Use to show we stay on a problem until it's actually closed.

conversationHooks.hook: If it's legal where you are, we'll attempt it. A yellow-fever vaccine slot in Juhu, urgent medicines at night in Delhi, a Game of Thrones birthday — same machine, every time.
conversationHooks.context: Category-defining line for Special Requests. Use to close the pitch.
